---
title: "`r params$doc_title`"
subtitle: "`r params$doc_subtitle`"
author: "Biometrics Group, IRRI"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y %B %d')`"  
# date last modified: 2022 June 28
params:
  phenoDTfile: !r c("staslhzx01347","stasqdap16930","stamswvc43789","stalhncq03740","statvfrh34220","stavwdto78948","stavmmxa16880") #c("gegfchxu59984","gegurtzd34030")
  outputPath: !r here::here("Result")
  doc_title: "Visualization of pipeline metrics"
  doc_subtitle: "Version 2.1"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: TRUE
    toc_depth: 4
    toc_float: 
      collapsed: FALSE
      smooth_scroll: FALSE
---

<style>
.main-container {
margin-left: 0;
margin-right: auto;
}
.tab-content {
margin-bottom: 50px;
}
</style>

```{r setup, include = FALSE}

# knitr R markdown chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(dependson = knitr::all_labels(),
                      echo = FALSE,
                      cache = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      comment = NA,
                      out.width = "100%",
                      error = TRUE)
options(knitr.kable.NA = '', knitr.duplicate.label = "allow")

# loading necessary R packages ####
library(cgiarBase)
library(plotly)     # ggplotly()

```


```{r dataLoading, include = FALSE}
# loading the dataset
if (is.null(params$phenoDTfile)) stop("No input phenotypic data file specified.")
mydata <- read.csv(file.path("pipeline_metrics.csv"))
useAna <- which(mydata$analysis.id %in% params$phenoDTfile)
if(length(useAna) == 0){stop("No values found under this phenoDTfile.", call. = FALSE)}
mydata <- mydata[useAna,]
# mydata$parameter <- paste(mydata$parameter,mydata$analysis.id,sep="_")
trait <- unique(mydata$parameter)
mydata$pipeline.id <- paste(mydata$pipeline.id, mydata$analysis.id, sep="_")
mydata$fieldinst <- paste(mydata$parameter, mydata$analysis.id, mydata$fieldinst)
mydata$text <- mydata$fieldinst #paste(mydata$analysis.id, mydata$fieldinst)
```

*** 

```{r xxx, include = TRUE}
cat(paste("Analysing dataSET with id(s):", paste(params$phenoDTfile, collapse = ", ")))

```

### Pipeline metrics summary

```{r dataChecking, include=TRUE}

printTable(mydata, caption = "using the cleaned dataset")

```

### Metric value ~ trait 

Using pipeline metrics from the database. 

```{r visual, results = 'asis'}
# , fig.dim = c(6, 18)
p2 <- list()
mydataSplit0 <- split(mydata, mydata$pipeline.id)

for(kD in 1:length(mydataSplit0)){
  mydataSplit <- mydataSplit0[[kD]]
  listTrace <- listTrace2 <- buttons <- buttons2 <- list()
  tt <- rep(FALSE, length(trait)); names(tt) <- trait
  
  tt2 <- rep(TRUE, length(trait))
  buttons[[1]] <- list(
    args = list("visible", tt2), 
    label = "All", 
    method = "restyle"
  )
  
  for(j in 1:length(trait)){
    
    listTrace[[j]] <- list(
      name = trait[j], 
      type = "bar", 
      x = mydataSplit[which(mydataSplit$parameter == trait[j]),"trait"], 
      y = mydataSplit[which(mydataSplit$parameter == trait[j]),"value"],
      text=mydataSplit[which(mydataSplit$parameter == trait[j]),"text"],
      color= mydataSplit[which(mydataSplit$parameter == trait[j]),"fieldinst"] # cols[as.factor(mydataSplit[which(mydataSplit$parameter == trait[j]),"fieldinst"])] #
    )
    tt2 <- tt
    tt2[j] <- TRUE
    buttons[[j+1]] <- list(
      args = list("visible", tt2), 
      label = trait[j], 
      method = "restyle"
    )
    
  }
  
  layout <- list(
    title = "Values split by pipeline and analysis", 
    xaxis = list(domain = c(0.1, 1), title="Year of origin"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Prediction value"),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    updatemenus = list(
      list(
        x = 0.45, 
        y = 1.5, 
        buttons = buttons, 
        yanchor = "top"
      )
    )
  )
  
  p <- plot_ly()
  for(j in 1:length(trait)){ # line=listTrace[[j]]$line, 
    p <- add_bars(p, name=listTrace[[j]]$name, type=listTrace[[j]]$type, x=listTrace[[j]]$x, 
                  y=listTrace[[j]]$y, text=listTrace[[j]]$text, showlegend = FALSE, 
                  text=listTrace[[j]]$text, color=listTrace[[j]]$color)
  }
  p <- layout(p, title=layout$title, updatemenus=layout$updatemenus,
              xaxis = list(domain = c(0.1, 1), title="Trait of interest"),
              height=1000,
              yaxis = list(title = "Metric value")
  )
  p2[[kD]] <- p
}
subplot(p2, nrows=length(p2))
```
